source:
#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table SAP_HR_Weekly into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import json
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
#import pandas as pd
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import os
import re
from itertools import chain
from collections.abc import Mapping
from operator import add
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format,when, to_date,current_date,concat,cast,regexp_replace
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.sap_hr_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.load_sap_hr_weekly"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}saphr/load_sap_hr_weekly"

print(target_delta_table)
print(delta_table_path)

# Load the source tables
#df_source_sap_wwekly = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferschema","true").table(source_delta_table)
df_source_sap_weekly = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferschema","false").table(source_delta_table)

#df1 = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferschema","true").table(target_delta_table)

#print(df_source_sap_weekly.count())

#print(df_source_sap_weekly.printSchema())

#print(df1.printSchema())

# Remove rows where 'PersNo' is null
df_source_sap_weekly = df_source_sap_weekly.filter(col("PersNo").isNotNull())

# Define columns list to be used for RowID hash
excluded_columns = {"ingested_datetime","expected_from","expected_to"} 
rowid_columns = [c for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns if c not in excluded_columns]

#display(df_source_sap_wwekly)

target_sap_hr_weekly_df1 = df_source_sap_weekly.select(
    *[col(c).cast("string") for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns], # Convert all columns to STRING
    current_date().cast("date").alias("Report_MonthEnd_Date"),
    current_timestamp().alias("PDAC_ETL_Date"),
    lit("SapHr").alias("SourceSystemID"),
    current_timestamp().alias("IngestionDate"),
    current_date().cast("timestamp").alias("ValidTo"),
    md5(concat(*[col(c).cast("string") for c in rowid_columns])).alias("RowID"), # Excluded columns are removed
    lit("Y").alias("IsActive")
)

print(target_sap_hr_weekly_df.printSchema())

target_sap_hr_weekly_df = target_sap_hr_weekly_df.select(
    col("PersNo"),
    col("Firstname"),
    col("Lastname"),
    col("EmployeeNo"),
    col("CoCd"),
    col("CompanyCode"),
    col("PA"),
    col("PersonnelArea"),
    col("PSubarea"),
    col("PersonnelSubarea"),
    col("Orgunit"),
    col("OrganizationalUnit"),
    col("Organizationalkey"),
    col("OrganizationalKey1"),
    col("WorkC"),
    col("WorkContract"),
    col("CT"),
    col("ContractType"),
    col("PSgroup"),
    col("PayBandDescription"),
    col("FTE").cast("double").alias("FTE"),
    col("Wkhrs").cast("double").alias("Wkhrs"),
    col("IndicatorPartTimeEmployee"),
    col("S"),
    col("EmploymentStatus"),
    col("GenderKey"),
    col("TRAStartDate"),  
    col("TRAEndDate"),
    col("TRAStatus"),
    col("TRAGrade"),
    col("PrevPersNo"),
    col("ActR"),
    col("ReasonforAction"),
    col("Position"),
    col("Position1"),
    col("CostCtr"),
    col("CostCentre"),
    to_date(col("CivilServiceStart"), "M/d/yyyy").cast("timestamp").alias("CivilServiceStart"),
    to_date(col("DatetoCurrentJob"), "M/d/yyyy").cast("string").alias("DatetoCurrentJob"),
    to_date(col("SeniorityDate"), "M/d/yyyy").cast("string").alias("SeniorityDate"),
    col("DatetoSubstGrade").cast("timestamp").alias("DatetoSubstGrade"),
    col("PersNo1"),
    col("NameofManagerOM"),
    col("ManagerPosition"),
    col("ManagerPositionText"),
    #col("CounterSignManager"),
    col("CounterSignManager").cast("double").alias("CounterSignManager"),
    col("Loc"),
    col("Location"),
    to_date(col("OrgStartDate"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("timestamp").alias("OrgStartDate"),
    col("FixTermEndDate"),  
    col("LoanStartDate"),  
    col("LoanEndDate"),  
    col("EEGrp"),
    col("EmployeeGroup"),
    col("Annualsalary").cast("double").alias("Annualsalary"),
    col("Curr"),
    lit(None).alias("NInumber"),  #Avoid added any duplicates Data to NI number Column for weekly SAP HR loads 
    to_date(col("Birthdate"), "dd/MM/yyyy").cast("string").alias("Birthdate"),    
    col("Ageofemployee").cast("double").alias("Ageofemployee"),
    col("EO").cast("double").alias("EO"),
    col("Ethnicorigin").cast("double").alias("Ethnicorigin"),
    col("NID").cast("double").alias("NID"),
    col("Rel").cast("double").alias("Rel"),
    col("ReligiousDenominationKey").cast("double").alias("ReligiousDenominationKey"),
    col("SxO").cast("double").alias("SxO"),
    col("WageType").cast("double").alias("WageType"),
    col("EmployeeSubgroup"),
    col("LOAAbsType").cast("double").alias("LOAAbsType"),
    col("LOAAbsenceTypeText").cast("double").alias("LOAAbsenceTypeText"),
    col("Schemereference").cast("double").alias("Schemereference"),
    col("PensionSchemeName"),
    col("DisabilityCode"),
    col("DisabilityText"),
    col("DisabilityCodeDescription"),
    col("PArea"),
    col("PayrollArea"),
    col("AssignmentNumber").cast("double").alias("AssignmentNumber"),
    col("FTE2").cast("double").alias("FTE2"),
    current_date().cast("date").alias("Report_MonthEnd_Date"),
    current_timestamp().alias("PDAC_ETL_Date"),
    lit("SapHr").alias("SourceSystemID"),
    current_timestamp().alias("IngestionDate"),
    current_date().cast("timestamp").alias("ValidTo"),
    md5(concat(*[col(c).cast("string") for c in rowid_columns])).alias("RowID"),
    lit("Y").alias("IsActive")
)

# Verify schema after conversion
#target_sap_hr_weekly_df.printSchema()



# Write data to Delta table odw_harmonised_db.sap_hr_weekly
try:
    target_sap_hr_weekly_df1.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)
    spark.sql(f"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {target_delta_table} USING DELTA LOCATION '{delta_table_path}'")
    print(f"Data successfully written to {target_delta_table}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise

data_loaded = target_sap_hr_weekly_df1.count()

#print(f"SAP Employee Hierarchy Weekly Processing Completed.{data_loaded} records loaded Successfully")
#display(target_sap_hr_weekly_df)
#display(df_source_sap_wwekly)

%%sql

INSERT INTO odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_weekly (PersNo, Firstname, LastName, EmployeeNo, CoCd, CompanyCode, PA, 
PersonnelArea, PSubarea, PersonnelSubarea, OrgUnit, OrganizationalUnit, 
OrganizationalKey, OrganizationalKey1, WorkC, WorkContract, CT, ContractType, 
PSgroup, PayBandDescription, FTE, WkHrs, IndicatorPartTimeEmployee, S, EmploymentStatus, 
GenderKey, TRAStartDate, TRAEndDate, TRAStatus, TRAGrade, PrevPersNo, ActR, 
ReasonForAction, Position, Position1, CostCtr, CostCentre, CivilServiceStart, 
DateToCurrentJob, SeniorityDate, DateToSubstGrade, PersNo1, ManagerNameOM, 
ManagerPosition, ManagerPositionText, CounterSignManager, Loc, Location, OrgStartDate, 
FixTermEndDate, LoanStartDate, LoanEndDate, EEGrp, EmployeeGroup, AnnualSalary, Curr, 
NINumber, BirthDate, AgeOfEmployee, EO, EthnicOrigin, NID, Rel, ReligiousDenominationKey, 
SxO, WageType, EmployeeSubgroup, LOAAbsType, LOAAbsenceTypeText, SchemeReference, 
PensionSchemeName, DisabilityCode, DisabilityText, DisabilityCodeDescription, PArea, 
PayrollArea, AssignmentNumber, FTE2, Report_MonthEnd_Date, PDAC_ETL_Date, 
SourceSystemID, IngestionDate, ValidTo, RowID, IsActive
)
SELECT 
PersNo, Firstname, Lastname AS LastName, EmployeeNo, CoCd, CompanyCode, PA, 
PersonnelArea, PSubarea, PersonnelSubarea, Orgunit AS OrgUnit, OrganizationalUnit, 
Organizationalkey AS OrganizationalKey, Organizationalkey1 AS OrganizationalKey1, 
WorkC, WorkContract, CT, ContractType, PSgroup, PayBandDescription, FTE, 
Wkhrs AS WkHrs, IndicatorPartTimeEmployee, S, EmploymentStatus, GenderKey, 
TRAStartDate, TRAEndDate, TRAStatus, TRAGrade, PrevPersNo, ActR, 
ReasonforAction AS ReasonForAction, Position, Position1, CostCtr, CostCentre, 
CivilServiceStart, DatetoCurrentJob AS DateToCurrentJob, SeniorityDate, 
DatetoSubstGrade AS DateToSubstGrade, PersNo1, NameofManagerOM AS ManagerNameOM, 
ManagerPosition, ManagerPositionText, CounterSignManager, Loc, Location, OrgStartDate, 
FixTermEndDate, LoanStartDate, LoanEndDate, EEGrp, EmployeeGroup, 
Annualsalary AS AnnualSalary, Curr, NInumber AS NINumber, Birthdate AS BirthDate, 
Ageofemployee AS AgeOfEmployee, EO, Ethnicorigin AS EthnicOrigin, NID, Rel, 
ReligiousDenominationKey, SxO, WageType, EmployeeSubgroup, LOAAbsType, 
LOAAbsenceTypeText, Schemereference AS SchemeReference, PensionSchemeName, 
DisabilityCode, DisabilityText, DisabilityCodeDescription, PArea, PayrollArea, 
AssignmentNumber, FTE2, 
current_date() AS Report_MonthEnd_Date, -- Assigning the current date
current_timestamp() AS PDAC_ETL_Date, -- Assigning the current timestamp
'SapHr' AS SourceSystemID, -- Placeholder value for SourceSystemID
current_timestamp() AS IngestionDate, -- Assigning the current timestamp
current_date() AS ValidTo, -- Keeping ValidTo as NULL initially
hash( -- Hash-based RowID generated from all columns
 PersNo, Firstname, Lastname, EmployeeNo, CoCd, CompanyCode, PA, 
 PersonnelArea, PSubarea, PersonnelSubarea, Orgunit, OrganizationalUnit, 
 Organizationalkey, Organizationalkey1, WorkC, WorkContract, CT, ContractType, 
 PSgroup, PayBandDescription, FTE, Wkhrs, IndicatorPartTimeEmployee, S, 
 EmploymentStatus, GenderKey, TRAStartDate, TRAEndDate, TRAStatus, TRAGrade, 
 PrevPersNo, ActR, ReasonforAction, Position, Position1, CostCtr, CostCentre, 
 CivilServiceStart, DatetoCurrentJob, SeniorityDate, DatetoSubstGrade, PersNo1, 
 NameofManagerOM, ManagerPosition, ManagerPositionText, CounterSignManager, 
 Loc, Location, OrgStartDate, FixTermEndDate, LoanStartDate, LoanEndDate, EEGrp, 
 EmployeeGroup, Annualsalary, Curr, NInumber, Birthdate, Ageofemployee, EO, 
 Ethnicorigin, NID, Rel, ReligiousDenominationKey, SxO, WageType, EmployeeSubgroup, 
 LOAAbsType, LOAAbsenceTypeText, Schemereference, PensionSchemeName, DisabilityCode, 
 DisabilityText, DisabilityCodeDescription, PArea, PayrollArea, AssignmentNumber, FTE2
) AS RowID, 
RUE AS IsActive -- Setting IsActive to TRUE
FROM odw_standardised_db.load_sap_hr_weekly;

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit, md5, concat, current_date, current_timestamp
from delta.tables import DeltaTable

# Step 1: Read source Delta Table
df_source_sap_weekly = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferSchema", "false").table(source_delta_table)

# Step 2: Remove rows where 'PersNo' is NULL
df_source_sap_weekly = df_source_sap_weekly.filter(col("PersNo").isNotNull())

# Step 3: Exclude "ingested_datetime", "expected_from", "expected_to" from rowid_columns
excluded_columns = {"ingested_datetime", "expected_from", "expected_to"} # Define columns to exclude
rowid_columns = [c for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns if c not in excluded_columns]

# Step 4: Select required columns and ensure correct data types
target_sap_hr_weekly_df = df_source_sap_weekly.select(
    *[col(c).cast("string") for c in df_source_sap_weekly.columns if c not in ["FTE2", "FTE", "Wkhrs", "CivilServiceStart","DatetoCurrentJob","SeniorityDate", "DatetoSubstGrade", "OrgStartDate","Birthdate"]], # Convert other columns to STRING
    col("FTE2").cast("double").alias("FTE2"),
    col("FTE").cast("double").alias("FTE"),
    col("Wkhrs").cast("double").alias("Wkhrs"),
    to_date(col("CivilServiceStart"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("CivilServiceStart"),
    to_date(col("DatetoCurrentJob"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("DatetoCurrentJob"),
    to_date(col("SeniorityDate"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("SeniorityDate"),    
    to_date(col("DatetoSubstGrade"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("DatetoSubstGrade"),
    to_date(col("OrgStartDate"), "d/M/yyyy").alias("OrgStartDate"),
    to_date(col("Birthdate"), "d/M/yyyy").cast("string").alias("Birthdate"),
    # Add additional metadata fields
    current_date().cast("date").alias("Report_MonthEnd_Date"),
    current_timestamp().alias("PDAC_ETL_Date"),
    lit("SapHr").alias("SourceSystemID"),
    current_timestamp().alias("IngestionDate"),
    current_date().cast("timestamp").alias("ValidTo"),
    # Compute RowID without excluded columns
    md5(concat(*[col(c).cast("string") for c in rowid_columns])).alias("RowID"),
    lit("Y").alias("IsActive")
)

# Step 5: Verify Schema
target_sap_hr_weekly_df.printSchema()

# Step 6: Write data to Delta Table (Schema Match Ensured)
try:
    target_sap_hr_weekly_df.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("mergeSchema", "true").save(delta_table_path)

    # Ensure the table exists
    spark.sql(f"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {target_delta_table} USING DELTA LOCATION '{delta_table_path}'")

    print(f" Data successfully written to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise
